title: DigiGait
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6n38a","text":"This protocol is used to test mice in the DigiGait behavioural test.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Habituate mice in the testing room for 60 minutes.
Place mice on the DigiGait treadmill and start the treadmill at 18-22cm/s. Record their movement for 3 seconds then place them back into their home cage.
Analyze 3-second clips with DigiGait Analysis Software.
creator: Haley Geertsma
